abilities.name: Better Part of Valor
abilities.description: Walk increased by +2 but has no Charge Aspect.

abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.description: Ignores other characters/terrain during movement. Reduce Ranged/Close Combat damage by half.

abilities.name: Insidious Whispers
abilities.description: Character ending turn within a3 must pass TN 8 Centering or gain Crazy +1 (- to Mental Aspect duels, may hear voices).

actions: (1) Touch of Madness (Prestidigitation) | AV: 4 (9) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Wp | Target suffers damage equal to Repressed Memories value, then gains Repressed Memories +1 until end of day (Initiative reduced). Crow Deepest Fears: Target must discard card.
(1) Psychotic Influence (Prestidigitation) | AV: 5 (10) | Rg: 9 | Resist: Wp | Target suffers 1/2/2 damage and gains Crazy +1. Crow Induce Phobia: After damaging, target makes TN 10 Horror Duel.
system.notes: Physical manifestations of madness pooled in sunken places. Ever-changing horrific form. Float languidly toward victims. Twisted whispers form demented thoughts and visions.
